query:
-- Find unmatched services whose supplierAccount matches a supplierAccount on an already-matched service
SELECT 
  u.externalId AS unmatched_svc,
  u.supplierName,
  u.supplierAccount,
  u.serviceType,
  u.phoneNumber,
  m.customerExternalId AS match_customer,
  m.customerName AS match_customer_name,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY u.supplierAccount) AS account_count
FROM services u
JOIN services m ON m.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND m.supplierName = u.supplierName
  AND (m.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND m.customerExternalId != '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != ''
ORDER BY account_count DESC, u.supplierAccount
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Find unmatched services whose supplierAccount matches a supplierAccount on an already-matched service
SELECT 
  u.externalId AS unmatched_svc,
  u.supplierName,
  u.supplierAccount,
  u.serviceType,
  u.phoneNumber,
  m.customerExternalId AS match_customer,
  m.customerName AS match_customer_name,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY u.supplierAccount) AS account_count
FROM services u
JOIN services m ON m.supplierAccount = u.supplierAccount
  AND m.supplierName = u.supplierName
  AND (m.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND m.customerExternalId != '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND u.supplierAccount != ''
ORDER BY account_count DESC, u.supplierAccount
LIMIT 20;
